Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2000 "TREASUREISLANDDIZZY-7F40-1B00-2000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7f40 jsr $1b00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Treasure Island Dizzy.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The call to $7F40 displays the loading screen, which includes the outer frame of the gameplay area. Added another routine at $1B00 which waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
